ItacPersonItem.Notes: For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, p. 299 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.). Vito Sorba was the founder of the Lima Academy in Trapani.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
